name: MikroTik Wireless Wire Dish
title: MikroTik Wireless Wire Dish
short_description: Pair of 2pcs of RBLHGG-60ad, 60GHz 802.11ad, 1xGLAN, 802.3af/at, RouterOS L3
description: Elevate wireless connectivity with the MikroTik Wireless Wire Dish, a solution that delivers fiber-speed quality over an impressive 2 Gb/s aggregate link, spanning distances of up to 1500m – all without the constraints of cables. The device employs AES encryption, ensuring the security of your wireless link in every communication. Operating on the 60 GHz frequency, this device sidesteps the challenges posed by crowded Wi-Fi spectrums. It not only guarantees high speed and capacity but also offers a reliable connection unaffected by interference.

detailed_description.heading: Fiber-Speed Wireless Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Elevate wireless connectivity with the MikroTik Wireless Wire Dish, a solution that delivers fiber-speed quality over an impressive 2 Gb/s aggregate link, spanning distances of up to 1500m – all without the constraints of cables. The device employs AES encryption, ensuring the security of your wireless link in every communication. Operating on the 60 GHz frequency, this device sidesteps the challenges posed by crowded Wi-Fi spectrums. It not only guarantees high speed and capacity but also offers a reliable connection unaffected by interference.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Operations, Robust Performance
detailed_description.text: The device adheres to the latest 802.11ad wireless standards, ensuring compatibility with modern networking protocols and delivering a seamless wireless experience. With an impressive 2.0 Gbps 60GHz radio rate, the Wireless Wire Dish sets a new standard for high-speed wireless communication. It guarantees swift data transfer rates, meeting the demands of bandwidth-intensive applications. At its core, the Wireless Wire Dish is driven by a Quad-core ARM Cortex A7 chipset clocked at 716 MHz. This robust processing power ensures seamless operations and the ability to handle complex networking tasks with ease. Backed by 256 MB of RAM, the device ensures efficient multitasking and smooth performance. Additionally, with 16 MB of storage memory, it provides ample space for storing essential configurations and firmware updates. Showcasing remarkable efficiency, the Wireless Wire Dish consumes a mere 5 W at maximum power.

detailed_description.heading: Secure and Convenient
detailed_description.text: Unlike traditional solutions that may struggle in bad weather, the Wireless Wire Dish is engineered for unwavering reliability. Its advanced design guarantees a robust wireless link, ensuring consistent performance even in challenging weather conditions. The kit comes equipped with automatic preconfiguration, streamlining the installation process. This user-friendly feature eliminates the need for complex manual configurations, making it a breeze to establish a secure and efficient wireless link. The device's metal base serves a dual purpose by not only enhancing durability but also optimizing mounting options. The upgraded design ensures that the device can be securely and conveniently mounted, adapting to various environments. Additionally, the improved cooling efficiency contributes to prolonged device life and sustained high performance.
